But right off the bat, a video called U.N. Owen was Ganon (obvious YTP video) was uploaded a day before this...
Unfortunately... most people outside of Nico Nico Douga use WMM which I hear is shitty, and given what I've seen... the videos made from it are shitty...
Nico Douga vids made with WMM suck too though...
I like to see some Youtube Poop variants of these fads... but the average Douger has skills that Youtube can't compete with.
